headline: The Google Pixel Watch 5 may have been spoiled by… the creator of Borderlands
summary: Randy Pitchford, Borderlands creator, posted images of a watch on X. The watch was found underwater by his friend near Saint Martin. This leak is believed to be an early look at the Google Pixel Watch 5.

headline: Pebblebee's Halo can help track lost items and keep you safe, and it's on sale for $50
summary: Pebblebee Halo is a dual-function Bluetooth tracker and personal safety device. It's useful for travelers, especially those exploring solo this summer. Currently discounted to $49.99 on Amazon, its best price yet.

headline: This could be Windows' M1 moment — but expect it to cost a ton
summary: Nvidia is entering the consumer laptop chip market with RTX Spark. This could provide Windows laptops with Apple M1-level Arm performance. Expect these high-performance Windows devices to be very expensive.

headline: Gemini's new AI agent is about as good as Google's demo
summary: Google's new Gemini Spark AI agent performs well in taking on tasks. Its effectiveness is comparable to Google's initial demonstrations. Concerns remain regarding its financial cost and potential privacy tradeoffs.

headline: Crimson Desert Dev Says It's Going to Improve the Game's Story to 'Make It More Engaging' as Part of Significant Changes Coming Soon
summary: Crimson Desert developer Pearl Abyss announced major game changes. Plans include improving the story to make it more engaging. Upcoming DLC for the game was also teased.

headline: Nintendo Music Launches Web Player, With Over 4 Hours of Mario Kart World Tunes
summary: Nintendo Music debuted a new web player for its game soundtracks. It now offers over four hours of highly requested Mario Kart World tunes. Mario Kart World is an exclusive title for the upcoming Switch 2.

headline: Resident Evil Series May Finally Set Future Game in Japan, Producer Says
summary: A Resident Evil producer suggests a future game may be set in Japan. This would mark the first time a mainline game uses a Japanese setting. The series has historically avoided its home country for main installments.

headline: Maverick Games' New Open-World Driving Game Will Be Revealed in Under 12 Hours
summary: Maverick Games will reveal its first project in under 12 hours. It's confirmed to be a AAA open-world action-driving game. The studio is led by former Forza Horizon 5 creative director Mike Brown.

headline: Murdered student did not die with dignity, says family, as bodycam footage shows him being handcuffed
summary: Family of murdered student Henry Nowak claims he was denied dignity in death. Bodycam footage reportedly shows Nowak being handcuffed prior to his death. The family urges treating knife crime as a "national emergency."

headline: How pupils with special educational needs are more likely to see their schools close
summary: Schools closing between 2020-2025 disproportionately affect SEN pupils. Almost 30% of children in these closed schools had special educational needs. This trend raises concerns about support for vulnerable students.

headline: Rescuers pull dead from rubble after Russian strikes kill 18 across Ukraine
summary: Russian strikes have killed 18 people across Ukraine. Rescuers are working to recover bodies from destroyed buildings. An 8-year-old boy and a woman were among those killed in an apartment strike.

headline: Third of people say uni degree not worth it, as student loan inquiry begins
summary: A third of individuals now believe a university degree is not worth it. An inquiry into student loans has officially begun with MPs hearing concerns. Graduates are raising issues about the large size and high interest rates of their debts.
